positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a group of floating, iridescent geometric shapes (like abstract polyhedra and spheres) arranged in a dynamic, balanced cluster. The shapes should appear to be composed of soft glowing light and crystal structures, giving them strong, defined silhouettes against a deep midnight blue background. The overall aesthetic is ethereal, sophisticated, and high-contrast, reminiscent of Art Deco mixed with modern celestial art. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep sapphire blue, glowing neon cyan, electric violet, and crisp white accents. The composition must be centered and scalable for apparel printing, focusing on clean lines and maximum visual impact. Flat illustration style, vector art quality, graphic design for fabric print.
